summary: Add Contact Flow improvements tested successfully. All 7 backend API tests pass. Frontend verified via Playwright: Add Contact tile navigates directly to /contact/new (no intermediate modal), New Contact form includes First/Last name, Phone, Email, Vehicle, Referred By, Notes, Record Voice Note button, Tags, and Address & Dates sections. Activity feed shows 'New Contact Added' events with correct label.

issues: Console warnings about 'Unexpected text node' inside <View> components - cosmetic issue, does not affect functionality

duplicate_check_existing_phone.details: Returns matching contacts for existing phone numbers

duplicate_check_no_params.details: Returns empty matches when no params

create_contact_logs_event.details: Creates contact AND logs 'new_contact_added' event in contact_events collection

add_contact_tile_direct_navigation.details: Home screen 'Add Contact' tile navigates directly to /contact/new without intermediate modal

new_contact_form_fields.details: Form shows: First name, Last name, Phone, Email, Vehicle, Referred by, Notes, Record Voice Note button, + Tag, Add Address & Dates

activity_feed_new_contact_events.details: Activity feed displays 'New Contact Added' events with description showing user and contact name

contacts_tab_auto_refresh.details: useFocusEffect added at line ~76 in contacts.tsx triggers loadContacts() when tab gains focus

critical_code_review_comments: Voice transcription requires EMERGENT_LLM_KEY - cannot test in headless browser (microphone permission)
Console warnings about 'Unexpected text node' in Activity page - cosmetic, consider fixing
seed_data_creation: Test contact TestDup{timestamp} created and deleted during test execution
context_for_next_testing_agent: Add Contact flow improvements verified working: (1) Direct navigation from home tile to /contact/new, (2) Duplicate check endpoint works, (3) New contact creation logs 'new_contact_added' event, (4) Contacts tab has useFocusEffect for auto-refresh, (5) Voice recorder button exists on form but requires microphone permissions to test transcription.

mocked_apis.Twilio SMS: MOCKED - SMS sends are logged but not delivered
mocked_apis.Voice Transcription: Requires EMERGENT_LLM_KEY - not tested in headless browser

screenshots.new_contact_form: Shows Add Photo, First name, Last name, Phone, Email, Vehicle, Referred by, Notes, Record Voice Note button (green), + Tag, Add Address & Dates
screenshots.activity_feed: Shows 'New Contact Added' event at top with correct label and description
